did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper proposes a color normalization strategy and a method to quantify the number of colors in dermoscopic images using histogram analysis of RGB channel differences. While it mentions that this methodology can serve as a preprocessing step for Machine Learning (ML) algorithms in Computer Aided Diagnosis (CAD) systems, the study itself does not use AI, ML, or deep learning to obtain its results; it focuses on the image processing technique for feature extraction/normalization.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
